In operational terms, this replaces every classical undefined case (division by zero, (0\cdot\infty), (0/0), (\infty/\infty), branch-cut ambiguity) by a typed boundary/branch/ambiguity artifact with explicit mass accounting and deterministic refinement prescriptions. a361c24ad31475727faf40c3.title: Classical computational practice conflates three logically distinct roles—specification, construction, and justification—into a single opaque execution. As a consequence, outputs are frequently (i) non-reproducible (hidden randomness, uncontrolled floating semantics, unspecified tie-breaking), (ii) unverifiable (no conservative bounds or checkable evidence), and (iii) non-composable (results cannot be safely reused as dependencies because their guarantees are implicit or absent).
